title: nasturtium coronopifolium
intro: Nasturtium coronopifolium, also known as Watercress Nasturtium or Tropaeolum coronopifolium, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Tropaeolaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The plant is also rich in vitamins and minerals, providing various health benefits such as reducing blood pressure and improving respiratory health. The herbal preparations of Nasturtium coronopifolium include infusions, teas, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is also used as a natural food ingredient for its peppery flavor and nutritional value.
